hero.badge: Platform for caregivers of people with rare diseases
hero.title: You're not
hero.subtitle: Describe symptoms in your own words. The system will connect you with parents and caregivers who share similar experiences. Together it's easier.
hero.quote: "When you hear hoofbeats, think horses, not zebras."

howItWorks.title: Three steps to a support group
howItWorks.subtitle: From description to first conversation — the whole process takes less than 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Write in your own words — no medical jargon. Describe what you see, when it started, and what has already been checked.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm searches the database of descriptions and connects you with people whose experiences are closest to yours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join a private support group. Share experiences, ask questions, and support others.

forWhom.title: ZebraPoint is for you if...
forWhom.parentsSubtitle: You're looking for other parents of children with similar symptoms
forWhom.parents1: Share experiences from the path to diagnosis
forWhom.parents2: Learn which specialists are worth visiting
forWhom.parents3: Find emotional support from people who understand
forWhom.caregiversSubtitle: You care for an adult with an undiagnosed condition
forWhom.caregivers1: Connect with other caregivers in a similar situation
forWhom.caregivers2: Exchange knowledge about available forms of support
forWhom.caregivers3: Avoid burnout — talk to those who understand
forWhom.patientsSubtitle: You're coping with an undiagnosed or rare disease yourself
forWhom.patients1: Find people with identical or similar symptoms
forWhom.patients2: Share what helped — and what didn't
forWhom.patients3: Build a support network on your own terms

privacy.title: Your data is yours
privacy.subtitle: We know you're writing about personal matters. We take that seriously.
privacy.anonDesc: You use a nickname. No one sees your name or email.
privacy.encryptedDesc: All data is stored in an encrypted database on European servers.
privacy.noAdsDesc: We don't sell data. We don't show ads. Ever.
privacy.deletionDesc: You can delete your account and all data at any time, with one click.

ctaFooter.title: Ready to find your group?
ctaFooter.subtitle: Join ZebraPoint for free. Describe your symptoms and find people who truly understand.
ctaFooter.copyright: © {{year}} ZebraPoint · Support for caregivers of people with rare diseases

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro1: Have questions about how ZebraPoint works, data privacy, or terms of use? You'll find all details in the terms, privacy policy, and About section, which we've linked in the footer.
faq.intro2: If something is unclear or you want to give feedback, use the contact form we'll provide with the full release. For now we're focused on helping you find a support group as quickly as possible.
